titulo: Investigating the potential use of frontier AI models for offensive cyberattacks: A human uplift study
autor: Jair Aguirre, Henri van Soest, Benjamin Sperisen, Zylex Lopez, Nicholas Kong, Adam Seri-Levi, James
resumo: RAND researchers found that today’s most advanced AI tools can help less-skilled people get started and work faster on cyberattacks, but they do not yet reliably enable them to carry out full, sophisticated attacks.
